# Feature: MVE Dialog Clip — Editing, Duration Header, Dropdown & Chip Polish

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-12 — do not edit manually unless correcting intent -->

## Intent

Fix MVE dialog clip UX issues found in Structure & Beats: textarea must be editable on click (not blocked by lane drag), header shows WPM-estimated duration as `HH:MM:SS` when text is present (live while typing), Radix dropdowns/popovers must stack opaque above the card, and emotion chips get a purple border.

## Preconditions

- Local `.scriptony` project open with MVE / Hörspiel timeline
- At least one dialog text block in Structure & Beats audio lane
- Desktop runtime (`npm run dev:desktop`)

## Happy Path

- [ ] Click into dialog textarea → caret appears and typing updates text
- [ ] With non-empty dialog text, header shows WPM duration as `HH:MM:SS` (e.g. `00:00:04`) next to scene label
- [ ] Duration updates live while typing (same estimate as clip width)
- [ ] Empty textarea → no duration shown in header
- [ ] Open Regie / Tags / Audio "+" menu → menu is opaque, card text does not bleed through
- [ ] Emotion chip (inline or toolbar) shows purple/lila border

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Textarea blur re-enables block drag for lane reorder
- [ ] Chip × still removes tag/emotion without breaking textarea focus fix

## Regression

- [ ] Lane drag-and-drop reorder still works when not editing textarea
- [ ] Emotion chip colors (white dark / black light) unchanged aside from border
- [ ] Kein-Audio footer and toolbar hover states still visible

## Assumptions

- Duration label uses WPM estimate from current draft text (not bound audio clip length)
- `HH:MM:SS` always includes hours segment (e.g. `00:01:30`)

## Implementation Notes

- Files touched: `MveDialogClipCard.tsx` (WPM `HH:MM:SS` header, textarea focus hooks), `MveDialogClipHost.tsx`, `AudioTimelineMveTextBlock.tsx` (sync `draggable=false` on textarea mousedown capture + focus state), `MveEmotionChip.tsx` (lila `border-violet-400`), `audio-utils.ts` (`formatDurationHms`), `index.css` (`.z-[110]` for Radix menus)
- Unit tests: `audio-utils.test.ts` (`formatDurationHms`), `MveEmotionChip.test.tsx` (border class)
- Textarea fix: capture-phase mousedown on textarea disables native `draggable` synchronously (WKWebView); blur restores via React state
- Dropdown fix: one CSS utility — shared by Popover/DropdownMenu primitives
- Limitation: header duration is WPM estimate from draft text, not bound audio clip length
- Caret fix (2026-07-12): `MveInlineTagChip` reserves `--token` width in overlay; chip label floats on top so caret tracks textarea layout (see `.qa/runs/debug-mve-textarea-caret-misalignment-2026-07-12.md`)
